title: Cuneiform Tablet #0751: Old Babylonian Sale Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a sale contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Sale Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records sale contract matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
